# MOUTHBREATHER

> Boston, Massachusetts experimental hardcore / mathcore / grindcore band, formed December 2016. Self-described "Massachusetts Gadget Metal" — fuses metallic hardcore, mathcore, post-hardcore, and grindcore. Signed to Good Fight Music. Currently promoting new single "Repeat After Me."

## Members

- Brett Cates — vocals
- Ryan Fosdick — guitar
- Derek Lamoreaux — bass
- Nick Cates — drums

## New Single

- [Repeat After Me — Presave](https://distrokid.com/hyperfollow/mouthbreather4/repeat-after-me/): forthcoming single from MouthBreather, available for presave on all major platforms via Hyperfollow.

## Discography

- **Self-Tape** (LP, November 2023, Good Fight Music) — concept album where every track is influenced by a different movie. Engineered as a single coherent statement on metallic hardcore. [Listen on Bandcamp](https://mouthbreathercult.bandcamp.com/album/self-tape) · [Vinyl on Deathwish](https://deathwishinc.com/products/mouthbreather-self-tape)
- **I'm Sorry Mr. Salesman** (EP, 2021) — heavy amalgamation of hardcore, mathcore, and grindcore.
- **Dollmeat** (EP, 2018) — features the music video for "Feeding Time."
- **Pig** (EP, 2017) — debut EP.

## Listen

- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/7m6SeA1czZq8q7tkzRa20m): primary streaming presence
- [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/mouthbreather/1336077199)
- [Bandcamp](https://mouthbreathercult.bandcamp.com/): full catalog with high-quality downloads
- [YouTube — @MouthBreatherCult](https://www.youtube.com/@MouthBreatherCult): music videos and visualizers

- [Instagram — @mouthbreathercult](https://www.instagram.com/mouthbreathercult/): primary social channel, tour announcements, behind-the-scenes
- [X / Twitter — @MouthBreatherMA](https://x.com/MouthBreatherMA)
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/MouthBreatherCULT/)

## Live & Merch

- [Tour Dates / Bandsintown](https://www.bandsintown.com/a/15123808-mouthbreather): upcoming shows and ticket links
- [Official Merch](https://shop.mouthbreather.band): apparel and physical releases
- [Self-Tape Vinyl — Deathwish Inc](https://deathwishinc.com/products/mouthbreather-self-tape)

## Press & Context

- Genre: experimental hardcore, mathcore, metalcore, grindcore, post-hardcore. Self-coined: "Gadget Metal."
- Influences cited by the band include Deftones, Primus, Tool, Underoath, Converge, Curl Up and Die.
- Hometown: Boston, Massachusetts, USA.
- Active since: December 2016.
- Label: Good Fight Music (also distributed via Deathwish Inc).

## Booking & Contact

- DM via Instagram: [@mouthbreathercult](https://www.instagram.com/mouthbreathercult/)

## Site

- Domain: https://mouthbreather.band
- Notes: Single-page static site. The hero video is a band reel; all key links above are also visible on-page.
